'''鈭歵h-s-m-z''' ('''kathasmezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jester|jester]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-s-m-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jester|jester]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-s-m-z
|-
! Lemma
| kathasmezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithasmezoko|thithasmezoko]] || [[word:jithasmezoko|jithasmezoko]] || [[word:shithasmezoko|shithasmezoko]] || [[word:kithasmezoko|kithasmezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothasmezoko|thothasmezoko]] || [[word:jothasmezoko|jothasmezoko]] || [[word:shothasmezoko|shothasmezoko]] || [[word:kothasmezoko|kothasmezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
